## Description

What does this PR do? Link any related issues (e.g. `Fixes #123`).

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`gofmt -s -w .`)
- [ ] Code passes vet (`go vet ./...`)
- [ ] No new external dependencies added to core
- [ ] Exported types and functions have doc comments
- [ ] Documentation updated (if public API changed)
